description: Dashboard for Apache Doris (内部定制版)

panels.description: CPU Usage stat of Backends.

targets.expr: ((sum(rate(doris_be_cpu{job="$be_cluster_id"}[$interval])) by (job, instance)) - (sum(rate(doris_be_cpu{mode="idle", job="$be_cluster_id"}[$interval])) by (job, instance))) / (sum(rate(doris_be_cpu{job="$be_cluster_id"}[$interval])) by (job, instance)) * 100

((sum(rate(doris_be_cpu{job="$be_cluster_id"}[$interval])) by (job, instance)) - (sum(rate(doris_be_cpu{mode="idle", job="$be_cluster_id"}[$interval])) by (job, instance)) - (sum(rate(doris_be_cpu{mode="iowait", job="$be_cluster_id"}[$interval])) by (job, instance))) / (sum(rate(doris_be_cpu{job="$be_cluster_id"}[$interval])) by (job, instance)) * 100

panels.title: BE CPU Usage

panels.description: Memory usage of Backends.
panels.title: BE Mem

panels.description:
IO util of Backends.
High means I/O is busy.
panels.title: Disk IO util

panels.description: Including s3 load / stream load / ...
panels.title: Load Overview

panels.description: The compaction score of each BE
panels.title: BE Compaction Score
workload group memtable flush queue size
workload group memtable flush active threads

panels.description: Left Y axes indicates the total received bytes rate of txn. Right Y axes indicates the loaded rows rate of txn.
panels.title: Stream Load Bytes/Rows rate

panels.description: 99/avg quantiles of query latency on each Frontends.
panels.title: Txn Latency

panels.description: The number of total publish task request and error rate.
panels.title: Publish Task / s

panels.description:
Left Y axes indicates the failure rate of specified tasks. Normally, it should be 0.
Right Y axes indicates the total number of specified tasks in all Backends.
panels.title: task/s

panels.description: Show the txn rstatus on FE
panels.title: fe_txn_status / s

panels.description: 观察 mow 事务 commit 延迟比较有用。
panels.title: Commit & Publish Latency

panels.description: The connections' number to each Frontends.
panels.title: Connections

panels.description:
QPS statistic group by cluster.
The QPS of each cluster is the sum of all queries processed on all Frontends.
panels.title: Cluster QPS Stat

panels.description: 99/avg quantiles of query latency on each Frontends.
panels.title: Latency (latency is not 0 even there is no request)

panels.description: 99/avg quantiles of query latency on each Frontends.
panels.title: FE commitAndPublish Latency(非stream load)

panels.description: 观察 mow 事务 commit 延迟比较有用。
panels.title: Commit & Publish Latency(stream load)

panels.description: 99/avg quantiles of query latency on each Frontends.
panels.title: FE Get Table Commit Lock Latency

panels.description: 99/avg quantiles of query latency on each Frontends.
panels.title: Get Delete Bitmap Update Lock Latency

panels.description: 99/avg quantiles of query latency on each Frontends.
panels.title: FE Calculate Delete Bitmap Latency

panels.description: 99/avg quantiles of query latency on each Frontends.
panels.title: FE Commit To MS Rpc Latency
Compaction Get Delete Bitmap Lock Time
Compaction Get Delete Bitmap Lock Backoff Time
MS Delete Bitmap Lock Txn Ops

panels.description: Memory usage of Backends.
panels.title: BE Mem

panels.description: The FE collect compaction score of each BE
panels.title: FE Collect Compaction Score

panels.description: The compaction score of each BE
panels.title: BE Compaction Score

targets.expr: sum(rate(doris_be_engine_requests_total{job="$be_cluster_id", type=~".*compaction.*", instance="$be_instance"}[$interval])) by ( instance, type, status)

panels.description:
Base compaction rate of Backends.
Normally, base compaction only runs between 20:00 to 4:00 and it is configurable.
Right Y axes indicates the total base compaction bytes.
panels.title: BE Compaction Base

panels.description:
Cumulative compaction rate of Backends.
Right Y axes indicates the total cumulative compaction bytes.
panels.title: BE Compaction Cumulate

panels.description: The compaction score of each BE
panels.title: BE Compaction Score

panels.description: 99/avg quantiles of query latency on each Frontends.
panels.title: Read Cluster Latency (latency is not 0 even there is no request)

panels.description: 99 quantiles of query latency on each Frontends.
panels.title: read cluster 999th & 99th Latency

panels.description: 99/avg quantiles of query latency on each Frontends.
panels.title: Write Cluster Latency (latency is not 0 even there is no request)

panels.description: 99 quantiles of query latency on each Frontends.
panels.title: 999th Latency

panels.description:
JVM Heap usage of specified Frontend.
Left Y Axes shows the used/max heap size.
Right Y Axes shows the used percentage.

targets.expr: sum(jvm_heap_size_bytes{ job="$fe_cluster_id", type="used"}) by (instance) * 100 / sum(jvm_heap_size_bytes{job="$fe_cluster_id", type="max"}) by (instance)

panels.title: JVM Heap

panels.description: Num of threads of FE JVM
panels.title: JVM Threads

panels.description: The compaction score of each BE
panels.title: BE Delete Bitmap Checker

panels.description: The compaction score of each BE
panels.title: Delete Bitmap Score (>=304)

panels.description:
leaked: 没有对应rowset的delete bitmap的数目
abnormal: 不属于mow表的delete bitmap的数目
panels.title: MS Delete Bitmap Checker (Cloud Only)

panels.description: Basic CPU info
panels.title: CPU Basic

panels.description: Basic memory usage

matcher.options: Hardware Corrupted - Amount of RAM that the kernel identified as corrupted / not working

panels.title: Memory Basic
packed file avg small file num

panels.description: Left Y axes indicates the total received bytes rate of txn. Right Y axes indicates the loaded rows rate of txn.
panels.title: BE Ingest BINLOG Latency

panels.description: Left Y axes indicates the total received bytes rate of txn. Right Y axes indicates the loaded rows rate of txn.
panels.title: Read Remote Bytes

panels.description: The compaction score of each BE
panels.title: Delete Bitmap Score (>=304)

panels.description: Left Y axes indicates the total received bytes rate of txn. Right Y axes indicates the loaded rows rate of txn.
panels.title: BE Download Action Latency
Meta Service (还需要添加若干面板）

targets.expr: sum(s3_list_object_versions_qps{job="$be_cluster_id"}) by (instance) + sum(s3_head_qps{job="$be_cluster_id"}) by (instance) + sum(s3_list_qps{job="$be_cluster_id"}) by (instance)  + sum(s3_get_qps{job="$be_cluster_id"}) by (instance)

panels.description: Network send(Left Y)/receive(Right Y) bytes rate of all device except 'lo'
panels.title: Net send/receive bytes

panels.description: The file descriptor usage of Backends. Left Y axes shows the used fd num. Right Y axes shows the soft limit open file number.
panels.title: BE FD count

panels.description:
IO util of Backends.
High means I/O is busy.
panels.title: Disk IO util

panels.description: Disk capacity usage of Backends

targets.expr: (SUM(doris_be_disks_total_capacity{job="$be_cluster_id"}) by (instance, path) - SUM(doris_be_disks_avail_capacity{job="$be_cluster_id"}) by (instance, path)) / SUM(doris_be_disks_total_capacity{job="$be_cluster_id"}) by (instance, path)

panels.title: Disk Usage

panels.description: Statistic of Broker load jobs's num in each Load State.
panels.title: Broker Load Job

panels.description: Statistic of load jobs's num  in each Load State which is generated by Insert Stmt.
panels.title: Insert Load Job

panels.description: Statistic of Routine load jobs's num in each Load State.
panels.title: Routine Load Job

panels.description: Statistic of Spark load jobs's num in each Load State.
panels.title: Spark Load Job

panels.description: The trend report of broker load job
panels.title: Broker load tendency

panels.description: The trend report of insert load job
panels.title: Insert load tendency

panels.description: The trend report of routine load job
panels.title: Routine load tendency

panels.description: The trend report of spark load job
panels.title: Spark load tendency

panels.description: Number of running schema change jobs.
panels.title: SC Job

panels.description: Queue size of report in Master FE.
panels.title: Report queue size

panels.description: Number of running rollup jobs.
panels.title: Rollup Job

panels.description:
JVM Heap usage of specified Frontend.
Left Y Axes shows the used/max heap size.
Right Y Axes shows the used percentage.
panels.title: [$fe_instance] JVM Heap

panels.description:
JVM Non Heap usage of specified Frontend.
Left Y Axes shows the used/committed non heap size.
panels.title: [$fe_instance] JVM Non Heap

panels.description:
JVM old generation usage of specified Frontend. Left Y Axes shows the used/max old generation size. Right Y Axes shows the used percentage.
Normally, the usage percentage should be less than 80%.
panels.title: [$fe_instance] JVM Old

panels.description:
JVM full gc stat of specified Frontend. 
Left Y Axes shows times of full gc.
Right Y Axes shows the time cost of each full gc.

targets.expr: sum(jvm_old_gc{job="$fe_cluster_id", instance="$fe_instance", type="time"}) / sum(jvm_old_gc{job="$fe_cluster_id", instance="$fe_instance", type="count"})

panels.title: [$fe_instance] JVM Old GC

panels.description:
JVM young generation usage of specified Frontend.
Left Y Axes shows the used/max young generation size.
Right Y Axes shows the used percentage.
panels.title: [$fe_instance] JVM Young

panels.description:
JVM young gc stat of specified Frontend. 
Left Y Axes shows times of young gc.
Right Y Axes shows the time cost of each young gc.

targets.expr: sum(jvm_young_gc{job="$fe_cluster_id", instance="$fe_instance", type="time"}) / sum(jvm_young_gc{job="$fe_cluster_id", instance="$fe_instance", type="count"})

panels.title: [$fe_instance] JVM Young GC

panels.description: Num of threads of FE JVM
panels.title: JVM Threads

panels.description: Total Frontends node number
panels.title: FE Node

panels.description: The JVM heap usage percent of each Frontend of each Doris cluster.

targets.expr: sum(jvm_heap_size_bytes{job="$fe_cluster_id", group="fe", type="used"} * 100) by (instance, job) / sum(jvm_heap_size_bytes{job="$fe_cluster_id", group="fe", type="max"}) by (instance, job)

panels.title: Cluster FE JVM Heap Stat

panels.description: 99 quantiles of query latency on each Frontends.
panels.title: 99th Latency

panels.description: Total alive number of Frontends. Normally, it should be equal to the Total number of Frontends
panels.title: FE Alive

panels.description:
QPS statistic group by cluster.
The QPS of each cluster is the sum of all queries processed on all Frontends.
panels.title: Cluster QPS Stat

panels.description: Number of tablets begin scheduled. These tablet may be in recovery process or balance process
panels.title: Scheduling Tablets

panels.description:
The max replayed meta data journal id on Frontends.
Normally, all Frontends should be same on this metrics, or just slightly different for a short period.
panels.title: Max Replayed journal id

panels.description:
The counter of meta data image generation on Master Frontend. And the counter of image successfully pushing to other Non-master Frontends.
These metrics is expected to increase at reasonable intervals. And normally, they should be equal.
panels.title: Image counter

panels.description: The left Y axes shows write latency of 99th. The right Y axes shows the write per seconds of journal.
panels.title: BDBJE Write

panels.description: The left Y axes shows the read per seconds of journal.
panels.title: BDBJE Read

panels.description: The edit log size for each FE
panels.title: Edit Log Size

panels.description: The edit log clean of each FE
panels.title: Edit Log Clean

panels.description: The image clean of each FE
panels.title: Image Clean

panels.description: The image Write of each FE
panels.title: Image Write

panels.description: The image push of each FE
panels.title: Image Push

panels.description: The number of total publish task request and error rate.
panels.title: Publish Task on BE

panels.description: Show the txn rstatus on FE
panels.title: fe_txn_status

panels.description: Left Y axes indicates the total received bytes rate of txn. Right Y axes indicates the loaded rows rate of txn.
panels.title: Txn Load Bytes/Rows rate

panels.description: 99 quantiles of query latency on each Frontends.
panels.title: 99th Latency

panels.description:
Requests per seconds on each Frontends.
Requests include all requests sending to the Frontends.
panels.title: RPS

panels.description:
Queries per seconds on each Frontends.
Queries only include Select requests.
panels.title: QPS

panels.description: The connections' number to each Frontends.
panels.title: Connections

panels.description:
Left Y axes indicates 95 to 99 quantiles of query latency on each Frontends.
Right Y axes indicates the query rate per 1 min.
panels.title: [$fe_instance] Query Percentile

panels.description:
Left Y axes indicates the accumulated  error queries number.
Right Y axes indicates the error query rate per 1 min.
Normally, the error query rate should be 0.
panels.title: Query Error [1m]

title: Yinshaowen-Doris
